description: Accumulated BAFA raw snapshot fetch timestamps (snapshot -> fetched_at). Raw snapshot folders may be cleaned from disk to save space, but every product's bafa_snapshot_fetched_at (keyed by last_seen_snapshot) must stay resolvable. The app builder merges live raw/_meta.json values over this index and writes the merged result back, so this file maintains itself on every build. Committed on purpose — do not gitignore.
